message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 429 — unix::next_line_with_cx cancel contract

Attaches tick-429 progress comment describing the new
unix_next_line_with_cx_observes_pre_cancel test (commit b9557e71).
Extends the runtime_compat-owned cancel-source category to include
seam-level primitives like next_line alongside the per-poll guards on
yield_now + JoinSet. Local count 101/101.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
